final:
// // This module compresses the audio signal by reducing its dynamic range. It has an enable signal, a threshold level, and a gain factor. When enabled, if the audio input exceeds the threshold, the output will be the input divided by the gain factor. If the input is below the threshold, the output will be the same as the input. The output should also have a default value when the compressor is disabled.
module audio_compressor (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input enable,
    input [15:0] audio_in,
    input [15:0] threshold,
    input [15:0] gain,
    output reg [15:0] audio_out
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
        if (rst) begin
            audio_out <= 16'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            if (audio_in > threshold) begin
                audio_out <= audio_in * gain;
            end else begin
                audio_out <= audio_in;
            end
        end else begin
            audio_out <= 16'b0; // Default value when not enabled
        end
    end
endmodule
